shape_meaning: code cmp,vp,vpc,naive = L,W,L,L : ONLY value_profile resolves; cmplog, value_profile_cmplog, and naive all block. => vp-PRO (CMP_MAP gradient necessary AND sufficient where I2S alone is not) AND vpc-anti (adding the I2S CmpLog stage to VP regresses it).
label_source: Layer-1 resolve pattern (vp resolves, all others block). The measurements below are the INDEPENDENT verification (G2): they read only what each fuzzer's SAVED SEEDS physically contain (size + structural tokens) or REACH (per-seed execution depth at the gate line), never the vp-resolves / others-block pattern that defined the shape.
round0_outcome: REFUTED. Round-0's only decidable hypothesis was a VP value-DISTANCE climb scored by value_distance_reached (vp_min_distance << cmplog/naive). The arbiter ran it on the 5 branches -> 2 unmeasurable, 2 rule_not_met (harfbuzz 1, sqlite3 3). The scalar Hamming/magnitude closure signal did not separate VP's corpus from the blockers' for these dispersed_multibyte / structural-assembly gates. Value-distance is DEAD as the SOLE measurement here.
round1_outcome: PARTIAL. The round-1 pivot to seed_set:struct_size_and_token_count (joint_necessity, vp-vs-naive) CONFIRMED >=1 branch (vp_admits_structurally_richer_corpus is KEEP/decidable). 4 branches (harfbuzz/5237, sqlite3/14452,14518,14577) stayed rule_not_met: for those the structural-richness rule (size_lift>=1.3 OR tag_lift>=1.0) did not hold, and the restored value-distance climb also did not hold.
round2_pivot: Add a GENUINELY DIFFERENT, untried-tool mechanism for the 4 still-unlabeled branches: vp_drives_gate_deeper_per_seed, scored by the BUILT descriptor seed_set:depth_reach (depth_reach.py). The prior two hypotheses asked 'does VP's corpus CONTAIN more structure (bytes/tokens)' and 'do VP's operands get CLOSER to the gate value'. depth_reach asks a third, orthogonal question: 'does VP's resolving corpus REACH the gate line deeper / more often PER SEED than the blocking corpus' - an iteration/reach-depth advantage (the gate sits behind a parse loop / VDBE dispatch loop / shaping pass, and VP's structured seeds re-enter that region more times). This is independent of corpus size (depth_lift is per-seed-normalized) and of operand-distance, so it discriminates a reach-depth mechanism from a content-richness one. Built tool, both targets have cov images + on-disk corpora.

hypotheses.label: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient admits corpus members that physically CONTAIN more of the gate-required structure (longer / more SQL-relational / font-table tokens) than naive's blocking seeds, which stall as short degenerate fragments
hypotheses.collapse_rationale: The two ORIGINAL prior subtypes (harfbuzz GPOS structural-semantic-state climb; sqlite3 SQL-syntax/relational-expression assembly) and round-0's collapsed vp_gradient_distance_climb are ONE mechanism observed in two domains. Across all 5 members the cards say the SAME thing about what distinguishes the resolving from the blocking seeds: winners are STRUCTURED inputs that physically carry the required tokens (a valid SELECT with a bracketed '[...]' identifier or a '<='/'>=' relational expression; a font input deep enough to set the GPOS-attachment flag), while losers are SHORT MALFORMED FRAGMENTS ('; d T 1S', 'T 1; c BINARY', 'SELECT +LLLLLT', degenerate '2222...' / '&' runs). The discriminating quantity is therefore a STRUCTURAL one - seed size + token presence - identical in both domains; only the per-target token vocabulary differs (handled by params). No real-data measurement can tell 'GPOS structural state' apart from 'SQL syntax assembly' - both are 'VP's corpus is bigger / more tokenful than the blockers' - so they collapse to one hypothesis.

measurement.registry_tool_rationale: BUILT and a direct fit via joint_necessity.analyze_pair (the generic 2-arm structural comparison: --winner-fuzzer value_profile --loser-fuzzer naive). It reads the resolving (W) vs blocking (L) seed sets, computes median size + mean structural-token count per set, and emits size_lift (= vp_size/naive_size), tag_lift / token_lift (= vp_tags - naive_tags) plus armtag-prefixed vp_tags/vp_size/naive_tags/naive_size. This is exactly 'does VP's corpus contain more structure'. NOT value_distance_reached (refuted as sole signal round-0; also byte-alignment is forbidden on dispersed_multibyte/structural gates per data_realities). NOT operand_enrichment (corpus_queue:byte_freq_ratio) - it is fixed-offset single-literal only and returns no_gate_signature on structural/dispersed gates. NOT the 3-arm joint analyze() path - that is the vpc-RESOLVES joint-assembly subtype; here vpc BLOCKS, so we use the 2-arm pair path with vp as winner.
measurement.pair_choice_rationale: Winner = value_profile (resolving, 1-10 seeds per branch). Loser = naive (blocking, 10-19 seeds per branch) - NOT cmplog: the DB has NO cmplog seeds for any branch in this shape (only naive + value_profile_cmplog block), and naive is the cleaner contrast (zero CMP feedback of any kind, the degenerate-fragment seeds the cards describe). The vp>naive pair is the first covers_pairs entry for every member.

5237.note: default sfnt/OT tags; the gate (GPOS.hh:151) needs a font deep enough to assemble GPOS attachment -> resolving seeds carry more table tags + are larger than naive's truncated blockers

sqlite3._token_vocab: SQL relational/structural tokens the cards name as the assembled structure

14163.note: bracketed-identifier assembly at dequote:31402 (quote=='[') -> resolving seed carries a '[...]' token; naive blockers are ';d T 1S'-style fragments with no '['

14452.note: OP_Le VDBE dispatch needs a relational expression -> resolving seed carries '<='/'>='/'=' operators; naive blockers are short garbage that never parse a comparison opcode

14518.note: TK_LE parser arm needs a relational comparison operator between numeric operands; naive blockers ('SELECT +LLLLLT', 'SELECT +:SELECT') resolve down TK_ID/TK_VARIABLE arms

14577.note: rare true branch wants OPERATOR DIVERSITY (=,>=,<=,-,/); naive blockers are concentrated digit/operator runs ('2222...','&')

hypotheses.prediction: G1: value_profile's RESOLVING seed set is structurally RICHER than naive's BLOCKING seed set - it is longer AND/OR carries more of the gate-required structural tokens (size_lift >= 1.3 OR tag_lift >= 1.0). This is DISCRIMINATING: if VP's win were NOT a structural-assembly admission advantage (e.g. it resolved by a single lucky byte flip, or by edge coverage alone, or by an I2S literal substitution that naive could equally stumble into), VP's saved corpus would be NO bigger and carry NO more tokens than naive's blocking corpus - the structural metrics would not separate. An I2S/luck/edge mechanism predicts size_lift ~ 1 and tag_lift ~ 0. It can come out the other way: if naive's blockers are equally long / equally tokenful, the rule fails and the structural-assembly story is refuted.
hypotheses.refuted_if: size_lift < 1.3 AND tag_lift < 1.0 (VP's resolving corpus is neither longer nor more tokenful than naive's blocking corpus => no structural-assembly admission advantage; the VP-PRO label gets no independent structural confirmation and the branch falls to the next hypothesis / inconclusive).

hypotheses.label: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient admits corpus members that REACH the gate region deeper / more times PER SEED than naive's blocking seeds - the gate sits behind a parse/VDBE/shaping loop and VP's structured seeds re-enter and exercise that region rather than dying early, an iteration-DEPTH advantage that is independent of raw corpus size or operand byte-distance
hypotheses.novelty_rationale: GENUINELY DIFFERENT mechanism from both prior hypotheses and an UNTRIED built tool (depth_reach, registry NOT-yet-tried list). vp_admits_structurally_richer_corpus measures CONTENT (size + token bytes the seed physically holds). vp_gradient_distance_climb measures OPERAND PROXIMITY (how close intercepted CMP operands get to the gate value). depth_reach measures REACH: replays each W (vp-resolving) and L (naive-blocking) seed through the libafl-<target>-cov image and reads the blocker LINE's per-seed-normalized execution count + the blocked-side count from llvm-cov, emitting depth_lift (winner_depth / loser_depth, per-seed normalized) and side_lift. A seed can be SHORT yet drive the gate line many times (deep recursion / loop iteration), and a seed can be LONG yet never reach the line - so depth_reach is orthogonal to size_lift/tag_lift, and orthogonal to operand-distance (it counts executions at the line, not operand values). This catches the 4 round-1 holdouts whose VP advantage is a reach/iteration effect (sqlite3: the VDBE OP_Le dispatch loop + the resolveExprStep / ExprCodeTarget recursive walk re-visit comparison arms many times for a structured query but never for a short fragment; harfbuzz: the GPOS position_finish_offsets pass over the buffer is entered per glyph-attachment, so a GPOS-deep font drives line 151 far more than a truncated font) rather than a content-richness effect the round-1 size/token rule missed.

measurement.registry_tool_rationale: BUILT (seed_set:depth_reach:branch_line:per_branch). Direct fit: runs winner-resolving (value_profile) vs loser-blocking (naive) seeds through libafl-<target>-cov, reads the branch line's per-seed-normalized execution count + blocked-side count via llvm-cov. Its declared subtype is 'ctx/ngram ITERATION-DEPTH (winner corpus drives the branch deeper per seed)', which is exactly the reach/iteration question for these loop/recursion-guarded gates. Both targets in this shape (harfbuzz, sqlite3) have the cov image + on-disk corpora (data_realities), so every branch here is scoreable. Pair = value_profile (winner) vs naive (loser): same pairing rationale as the structural hypothesis - no cmplog seeds exist in the DB for this shape, and naive is the zero-feedback contrast.
measurement.pair_choice_rationale: Winner = value_profile (resolving). Loser = naive (blocking). NOT cmplog (no cmplog seeds in DB for this shape); NOT vpc (vpc is the anti half, and its block is attributed to budget-diversion not reach). naive is the clean zero-CMP-feedback baseline whose blocking seeds the cards describe as short fragments that die early in the parse.

5237.note: position_finish_offsets walks the buffer setting the GPOS-attachment scratch flag; a GPOS-deep font re-enters line 151 far more per seed than a truncated/attachment-free font

14452.note: OP_Le VDBE dispatch inside sqlite3VdbeExec's opcode loop - a structured relational query re-dispatches comparison opcodes many times per execution; short garbage never reaches the loop body

14518.note: TK_LE arm of resolveExprStep's recursive expression walk - a valid comparison expression visits the TK_LE switch arm per relational node; degenerate fragments resolve down TK_ID/TK_VARIABLE arms and never reach it

14577.note: rare true side inside sqlite3ExprCodeTarget's integer-comparison codegen - operator-diverse expressions re-enter the comparison codegen path; concentrated digit runs do not

hypotheses.prediction: G1: value_profile's RESOLVING seed set drives the gate line deeper PER SEED than naive's BLOCKING seed set (depth_lift >= 1.5 AND winner_deeper == true), i.e. VP's seeds reach and re-exercise the gate region while naive's short fragments die before / at the gate's containing loop. DISCRIMINATING: this is independent of size_lift (a short seed can drive the line many times via loop iteration, a long seed can miss the line entirely) and of operand-distance (it counts line executions, not operand bytes), so a CONTENT-richness mechanism (round-1 hypothesis) or an operand-proximity mechanism (round-0) does NOT predict a per-seed reach-depth gap - they predict depth_lift ~ 1 with the advantage already captured by size/token/distance. If naive's blockers reach the gate line just as deep per seed (depth_lift ~ 1) or VP is not deeper (winner_deeper false), the reach-depth story is refuted. It can come out the other way.
hypotheses.refuted_if: depth_lift < 1.5 OR winner_deeper == false (VP's resolving corpus does not drive the gate line deeper per seed than naive's blocking corpus => no iteration/reach-depth advantage; this hypothesis does not apply and the branch falls through to the next decision step / inconclusive).

hypotheses.label: adding the I2S CmpLog stage to value_profile (=vpc) diverts mutation energy / dilutes the corpus and so REGRESSES the same gradient climb (vpc-anti half of the shape)
hypotheses.undecidable_rationale: The vpc-anti half (vpc loses despite carrying the SAME VP CMP_MAP feedback) is attributed in every card to corpus-scale / per-exec-budget effects ('the added I2S CmpLog stage and per-execution CMP buffering dilutes its corpus and per-exec budget' / 'diverts mutation effort away from the gradient' / 'vpc's I2S stage regresses'). This is NOT discriminable with real campaign data: (a) I2S is UNTAGGED in mutation_op (data_realities) so there is no per-fuzzer 'I2S diverted energy' event to count; (b) VP is a feedback, invisible in mutation_op. A STRUCTURAL or DEPTH comparison of vp-resolving vs vpc-blocking seeds (joint_necessity / depth_reach could run it - vpc has 10-20 blocking seeds per branch) would NOT discriminate the overhead story: an energy/budget-diversion mechanism does NOT predict that vpc's blocking seeds are structurally smaller OR shallower than vp's resolving seeds (vpc could accumulate plenty of structure / reach the loop and still fail to cross the gate within budget), and any gap is confounded with ordinary corpus-scale run-to-run variance the data cannot attribute. We record the hypothesis honestly but mark it decidable:false; it does not gate the shape's verdict (G3).

hypotheses.label: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient climbs a comparison-operand distance ramp toward a structural/syntactic gate state that cmplog- and naive-blocking seeds never approach
hypotheses.collapse_rationale: The two prior subtypes (harfbuzz GPOS structural-semantic-state climb; sqlite3 SQL-syntax/relational-expression assembly) are ONE mechanism observed in two domains: VP preserves inputs whose intercepted CMP operands move incrementally closer to the values guarding a deep gate (a GPOS-attachment scratch flag behind many tag/integer CMPs; a bracketed-identifier or relational-operator token behind parser/VDBE CMPs). In BOTH, the discriminating quantity is the same: how close a seed set's CMP operands get to satisfying the gate. No real-data measurement can tell 'structural state' apart from 'syntax assembly' - both are a CMP-operand-distance climb - so they collapse to one hypothesis. The token vocabulary differs per target (handled by params), the measurement does not.

measurement.registry_tool_rationale: BUILT (seed_set:value_distance_reached:operand_literal:per_branch). Kept verbatim for loop monotonicity: round-0 validated this hypothesis on >=1 branch of this shape, so the confirmed branch must re-validate. It reads each arm's seeds and computes the MIN sliding-window Hamming/magnitude distance to the gate operand; the winner (vp) lands closer than losers (cmplog/naive). On the dispersed_multibyte / structural members it did NOT separate (those are covered by the structural + depth hypotheses above); on its confirmed branch it holds.

harfbuzz.gate_cmps: tag/integer comparisons guarding GPOS table parse -> HB_BUFFER_SCRATCH_FLAG_HAS_GPOS_ATTACHMENT at GPOS.hh:151

sqlite3.gate_cmps: byte/keyword/operator comparisons assembling bracketed-identifier or relational-operator tokens at sqlite3.c dequote/parser/VDBE lines 31402,87188,98662,103533

hypotheses.prediction: G1: value_profile's resolving seed set reaches a STRICTLY CLOSER minimum CMP-operand distance to the gate than BOTH cmplog's and naive's blocking seed sets (vp_min_distance < cmplog_min_distance AND vp_min_distance < naive_min_distance), and satisfies a larger fraction of gate CMPs (vp_gate_cmp_satisfied_frac >= naive_gate_cmp_satisfied_frac + 0.2). DISCRIMINATING: if the win were NOT a gradient climb (e.g. a single I2S literal substitution, or pure luck/edge-coverage), the blocking seeds would be just as close and the closest-approach distances would NOT separate by fuzzer. It can come out the other way (blocking seeds equally close => refutes vp-gradient).
hypotheses.rule: vp_min_distance < cmplog_min_distance AND vp_min_distance < naive_min_distance AND vp_gate_cmp_satisfied_frac >= naive_gate_cmp_satisfied_frac + 0.2
hypotheses.refuted_if: vp_min_distance >= min(cmplog_min_distance, naive_min_distance) (VP's corpus is no closer to the gate than the blockers' => no gradient climb), OR the satisfied-fraction gap < 0.2.
hypotheses.note_restored: round-0 validated >=1 branch; restored for loop monotonicity (KEEP).

data_realities_respected: I2S untagged in mutation_op -> NO seed_lineage:event_cooccurrence 'I2S event' descriptor proposed; the vpc-anti overhead hypothesis is honestly decidable:false for this reason.

value_profile is a FEEDBACK not a mutator -> its effect is measured only via corpus admission / what the corpus CONTAINS (struct_size_and_token_count) or REACHES (depth_reach), never via a lineage gradient event.

structural-assembly gates have different-SIZED W vs L seeds -> byte-alignment (operand_enrichment / byte_freq_ratio) is NOT used; it returns no_gate_signature on these dispersed_multibyte gates. We use struct_size_and_token_count, depth_reach, and value_distance_reached only.
on-disk corpora + cov images exist for harfbuzz and sqlite3 (both targets in this shape) -> every branch is scoreable; none is decidable:false merely for being off-server.

seed-dependent tools need resolving_seeds + blocking_seeds in db/blockers.sqlite: harfbuzz/5237 W(value_profile)=10 L(naive)=10; sqlite3/14163 W=1/L=10, 14452 W=3/L=19, 14518 W=4/L=17, 14577 W=3/L=17 - all pass the W>=1 (joint_necessity) / W,L>=1 (depth_reach) gates.
notes: ROUND-2 (loop-until-dry). PRIORS KEPT (superset, unchanged): vp_admits_structurally_richer_corpus (joint_necessity, rule size_lift>=1.3 OR tag_lift>=1.0, decidable:true, KEEP - confirmed >=1 branch) and vp_gradient_distance_climb (value_distance_reached, decidable:true, KEEP - confirmed >=1 branch, restored for monotonicity). vpc_i2s_overhead_regression remains decidable:false (G3 honest inconclusive - I2S untagged, overhead/budget-diversion not discriminable from corpus-scale variance). NEW MECHANISM for the 4 round-1 holdouts (harfbuzz/5237, sqlite3/14452,14518,14577): vp_drives_gate_deeper_per_seed, scored by the BUILT, untried-here descriptor seed_set:depth_reach (depth_reach.py, vp-vs-naive). It is a THIRD orthogonal axis - REACH/iteration depth at the gate line - distinct from CONTENT (size/token) and from operand PROXIMITY (distance), so per G1 a content- or distance-mechanism predicts depth_lift~1 while a true reach/loop-iteration advantage predicts depth_lift>=1.5 with winner_deeper. The 4 holdouts' gates all sit behind a loop/recursion (VDBE opcode dispatch, resolveExprStep recursive walk, ExprCodeTarget codegen, GPOS position_finish_offsets buffer pass), so a structured query/font re-enters the gate line per relational node / per glyph-attachment while a short fragment dies early - a reach effect the round-1 size/token rule could miss (short-but-deep or long-but-shallow seeds break the size correlation). DECISION ORDER: structural-richness first (cheapest, no docker), then depth_reach (docker per-branch ~30-60s), then value-distance (KEEP). A branch is labeled by the FIRST hypothesis whose rule holds; none holding -> fallback inconclusive. DECIDABLE:false sub-group = {vpc_i2s_overhead_regression} only. CAVEAT: depth_reach is per-seed-normalized; sqlite3/14452,14577 have only 3 W seeds (thin denom, flagged but ruleable); if a holdout's VP advantage is genuinely neither content nor reach nor proximity (e.g. a pure scheduling/luck effect), all three rules fail and it stays honest-inconclusive rather than forcing a label.
